problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
